overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a food vendor cooking in a neon-lit market stall, followed by the player character walking through an open cyberpunk courtyard adorned with red hanging lanterns and vending machines. The scene transitions from a sheltered cooking area to an open plaza with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall with wok cooking station

events.description: steam rises from the wok as the vendor begins cooking
vendor finishes cooking and begins to move away from the stall

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter watching the vendor prepare food

notable_agents.action: cooking in a large wok, stirring ingredients with a spatula

entered.detail: large metal wok on a cooking station with steam rising
stainless steel counter with cooking implements
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from the stall ceiling
stacked bottles and containers on the left side of the counter
illuminated menu board with text and prices

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk food stall where a vendor is actively cooking in a steaming wok. Red paper lanterns hang overhead in the sheltered cooking area, while condiment bottles and a menu sign sit on the metal counter. The vendor stirs ingredients while steam rises, creating an atmospheric neon-lit cooking environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk market courtyard with hanging lanterns

events.description: moves out from under the food stall awning into the open market courtyard
passes by a vending machine on the right and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market courtyard, passing vending machines and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: standing at a vending machine, interacting with the interface

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with glowing advertisements and 'BUY NOW' text
colorful arcade game machine with bright neon graphics
mobile food cart with steam rising, parked in the courtyard
row of market stalls with green awnings and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves out from the sheltered stall into an open cyberpunk courtyard illuminated by numerous red hanging lanterns and neon signs. The player walks past a vending machine and arcade cabinet on the right, while market stalls line the left side. The concrete ground shows cracks and weeds, with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, steaming interior of a food stall into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk courtyard. It begins focused on a vendor actively stirring ingredients in a steaming wok, surrounded by condiment bottles and red paper lanterns within a sheltered cooking area. As the camera pulls away from the metal counter, the scene opens up into a wide plaza where the atmospheric steam gives way to the open night sky. The movement continues past a vending machine and arcade cabinet on the right, while market stalls line the left side of the cracked concrete ground. Finally, the view expands to reveal scattered pedestrians wandering through the courtyard under a canopy of glowing red lanterns and vibrant neon signs.
